query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_project_linked,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title LIKE '%LATAM%' OR title LIKE '%Latin America%' OR title LIKE '%Americas%' OR title LIKE '%EMEA%' OR title LIKE '%Europe%' OR title LIKE '%Africa%' OR title LIKE '%Middle East%' OR title LIKE '%North America%' OR title LIKE '%South America%' OR title LIKE '%USA%' OR title LIKE '% UK %' OR title LIKE '%India%' OR title LIKE '%China%' OR title LIKE '%Japan%' OR title LIKE '%Global%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as non_au_in_title,
  SUM(CASE WHEN linkedinHeadline LIKE '%LATAM%' OR linkedinHeadline LIKE '%Americas%' OR linkedinHeadline LIKE '%EMEA%' OR linkedinHeadline LIKE '%Europe%' OR linkedinHeadline LIKE '%Africa%' OR linkedinHeadline LIKE '%Middle East%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as non_au_in_headline,
  SUM(CASE WHEN linkedinLocation IS NOT NULL AND linkedinLocation NOT LIKE '%Australia%' AND linkedinLocation NOT LIKE '%Sydney%' AND linkedinLocation NOT LIKE '%Melbourne%' AND linkedinLocation NOT LIKE '%Perth%' AND linkedinLocation NOT LIKE '%Brisbane%' AND linkedinLocation NOT LIKE '%Adelaide%' AND linkedinLocation NOT LIKE '%Darwin%' AND linkedinLocation NOT LIKE '%Hobart%' AND linkedinLocation NOT LIKE '%Canberra%' AND linkedinLocation != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as non_au_location
FROM contacts
WHERE id IN (SELECT contactId FROM contactProjects)

  SUM(CASE WHEN linkedinHeadline LIKE '%LATAM%' OR linkedinHeadline LIKE '%Americas%' OR linkedinHeadline LIKE '%EMEA%' OR linkedinHeadline LIKE '%Europe%' OR linkedinHeadline LIKE '%Africa%' OR linkedinHeadline LIKE '%Middle East%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as non_au_in_headline,
  SUM(CASE WHEN linkedinLocation IS NOT NULL AND linkedinLocation NOT LIKE '%Australia%' AND linkedinLocation NOT LIKE '%Sydney%' AND linkedinLocation NOT LIKE '%Melbourne%' AND linkedinLocation NOT LIKE '%Perth%' AND linkedinLocation NOT LIKE '%Brisbane%' AND linkedinLocation NOT LIKE '%Adelaide%' AND linkedinLocation NOT LIKE '%Darwin%' AND linkedinLocation NOT LIKE '%Hobart%' AND linkedinLocation NOT LIKE '%Canberra%' AND linkedinLocation != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as non_au_location
FROM contacts
WHERE id IN (SELECT contactId FROM contactProjects)
